# kemp_acme_certificate (Data Source)

Reads an ACME-issued certificate stored on a Kemp LoadMaster by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_acme_certificate" "existing" {
  name      = "example.com"
  acme_type = "1"
}

output "expiry_date" {
  value = data.kemp_acme_certificate.existing.expiry_date
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the ACME certificate as stored on the LoadMaster.

### Optional

- `acme_type` (String) ACME provider: `letsencrypt` (default) or `digicert`.

### Read-Only

- `domain_name` (String) Domain name on the issued certificate.
- `expiry_date` (String) Expiry timestamp as reported by LoadMaster.
- `http_challenge_vs` (String) VS endpoint (IP:port) used for the HTTP-01 challenge.
- `subject_alternate_names` (String) Comma-separated SANs as reported by LoadMaster.
- `type` (String) Cert algorithm (`rsa`, `ecc`).
